examples.title: Pseudocode: Stack Implementation
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating a stack implementation using a linked list
examples.code:
ALGORITHM StackPush(data)
INPUT: data to be pushed
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 newNode = new Node(data)
 newNode.next = head
 head = newNode
END

ALGORITHM StackPop()
INPUT: None
OUTPUT: popped data

BEGIN
 IF head == NULL THEN
 RETURN error
 END IF
 poppedData = head.data
 head = head.next
 RETURN poppedData
END
examples.explanation: Pseudocode for a stack implementation using a linked list. It includes push and pop operations.
